protocol.name: dwl_ipc_unstable_v2
protocol.copyright:

interface.name: zdwl_ipc_manager_v2
interface.description:
This interface is exposed as a global in the Wayland registry and allows clients to query and set dwl state.
Warning! The protocol described in this file is experimental and backward incompatible changes may be made. Backward compatible changes may be added together with the corresponding interface version bump. Backward incompatible changes are done by bumping the version number in the protocol and interface names and resetting the interface version. Once the protocol is to be declared stable, the 'z' prefix and the version number in the protocol and interface names are removed and the interface version is reset.

request.name: release
request.description: Indicates that the client will not use the manager object anymore. Objects created through this interface remain valid.

request.name: get_output

description.summary: get a dwl_ipc_output for a wl_output

request.description: Get a dwl_ipc_output for the given wl_output.

event.name: tags
event.description: This event is sent after binding and announces the number of tags.

event.name: layout
event.description: This event is sent after binding and announces a layout. Layouts are announced in order.

interface.name: zdwl_ipc_output_v2
interface.description: Observe and control a dwl output.

request.name: release
request.description: Indicates that the client will not use the dwl_ipc_output object anymore. Objects created through this interface remain valid.

request.name: set_tags

description.summary: set the active tags of this output

request.description: set the active tags of this output.

arg.name: tagmask
arg.summary: bitmask of the tags that should be set

request.name: set_client_tags

description.summary: set the tags of the focused client

request.description: Set the tags of the focused client.

request.name: set_layout

description.summary: set the layout of this output

request.description: Set the layout of this output.

event.name: toggle_visibility
event.description: Indicates that dwl visibility has been toggled.

event.name: active
event.description: Indicates the output is active (selected monitor).

arg.name: focused
arg.summary: 1 if focused client is in this tag

event.name: title
event.description: Indicates the focused client title changed.

event.name: appid
event.description: Indicates the focused client appid changed.

event.name: frame
event.description: Sent after all state events have been sent for a given state change.
